emails.subject: Please forward to the group
emails.body: Here it is. And I have JUST been informed that I have to be on a conference call tomorrow from 1-2. Could we do our call at noon or 2 pm California time? Sorry for the inconvenience. Best, Jeff Forwarded by Jeff Dasovich/SFO/EES on 09/05/2000 02:30 PM Tracy Cooper@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 09/01/2000 05:56 PM
